title: Peaceful Herbed Mediterranean Lamb Paella
description: A light and cozy Mediterranean dish featuring lamb, mint, and garlic, cooked to perfection in a paella pan. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the smoked paprika, saffron threads, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped fresh mint and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Add the uncooked Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is coated in the oil and spices.
Add the chicken broth to the paella pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the paella pan, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
